chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1547 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For Orders on CMA No. 6195/2022 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case. 31-01-2023 Mr. Nusrat Hussain Memon, Advocate for the petitioner.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Deferred. 2. Deferred. 3. The petitioner by way of instant petition has sought for direction against DIG police Benazirabad for ordering inquiry in respect of certain FIRs for the reason that those are false. On being asked, it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that the cognizance of the case in all those FIRs has already been taken by the Courts having jurisdiction, on submission of such reports by the police. If it is so, then further inquiry in pending cases by the police could hardly be ordered by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction by way of instant petition. It is dismissed in limini, advising the petitioner to prove his innocence or otherwise before the Courts concerned by joining the trial. JUDGE JUDGE Nasim /PA
